mapper.select: SELECT * FROM schedule WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule (dept_id, staff_id, work_date, time_period, total_count, remaining_count, register_fee) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{staffId}, #{workDate}, #{timePeriod}, #{totalCount}, #{remainingCount}, #{registerFee})
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET remaining_count = remaining_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND remaining_count > 0
UPDATE schedule SET remaining_count = remaining_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
